title: Creative and Marketing Intern
description:
We’re looking to hire Marketing & Creative Interns with a passion for fashion, content creation, and brand storytelling! Our team is made up of warm, positive, and driven individuals who love creating meaningful work together. If you’re excited about both the creative and strategic sides of fashion marketing, we’d love to meet you.

  • Gain hands-on experience across both creative production and marketing strategy, supporting photo shoots, video projects, and campaign executions.
  • Learn how fashion shoots are conceptualised, planned, and brought to life — while understanding how content is strategically used to drive brand awareness and sales in the local fashion industry.
  • Assist in the full creative process from pre-production to post-production, ensuring all content aligns with brand direction, campaign objectives, and marketing messaging.
  • Drive creative ideation by developing moodboards, campaign concepts, and content ideas for collections and seasonal launches.
  • Create and edit engaging short-form video content for social media (especially Instagram & TikTok), with a strong focus on audience engagement, trends, and performance.
  • Support digital marketing initiatives including design collaterals, EDMs, social media content, and promotional materials.
  • Assist in managing weekly launches by uploading assets and ensuring all digital touchpoints (website, social platforms, marketing materials) are cohesive and on-brand.
  • Gain exposure to content performance tracking and understand how creative decisions impact reach, engagement, and conversions.

Requirements:

  • Strong eye for aesthetics and an understanding of how visuals translate into effective marketing content.
  • Passion for fashion, social media, digital marketing, and brand-building.
  • Highly organised with good time management skills, able to juggle multiple projects in a fast-paced environment.
  • Familiar with social media platforms (Instagram & TikTok especially), with awareness of current trends and content strategies.
  • Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Premiere Pro) is a major advantage.
  • Experience in content creation (videography, photography, editing, styling) is a bonus.
  • Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate across creative and marketing teams.
  • Positive, proactive, adaptable, and eager to learn.

Please write to careers@loveandbravery.com with a short write-up of why you'd like to work with us, your resume and your portfolio.

Note: Only Singaporeans and PRs will be considered. Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further steps.

To get a feel for our style and ethos, explore us on Instagram @loveandbravery.

postedCompany.description:
Love and Bravery is a women’s label that creates everyday wear for the modern woman. Our pieces are thoughtfully crafted, with a focus on quality, cut and wearability.  We’re proud to be a brand that is designed in Singapore.

Founded in 2005, Love & Bravery started with a vision to inspire women to live better through dressing better.

We're constantly on a lookout for individuals who are passionate about fashion, creative and highly motivated to deliver their best.

Discover more about us @loveandbravery on Instagram!
postedCompany.name: LOVE AND BRAVERY ONLINE PTE. LTD.
